languages.text: Подразделение Астра Милитарум, набираемое на мире-улье Меров в качестве штрафных войск. Ряды легиона пополняются из числа ожесточенных преступников, призываемых на службу Императору для искупления совершенных ими грехов.

A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.
languages.original_text: Подразделение Астра Милитарум, набираемое на мире-улье Меров в качестве штрафных войск. Ряды легиона пополняются из числа ожесточенных преступников, призываемых на службу Императору для искупления совершенных ими грехов.

traits.locale_text: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

languages.text: Una unidad del Astra Militarum reclutada como fuerza penal en el mundo colmena de Merov. La legión se nutre de los criminales avezados reclutados al servicio del Emperador para expiar sus transgresiones.
languages.original_text: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

traits.locale_text: Una unidad del Astra Militarum reclutada como fuerza penal en el mundo colmena de Merov. La legión se nutre de los criminales avezados reclutados al servicio del Emperador para expiar sus transgresiones.

languages.text: 星界军的一支部队，作为判罪军团，招募自巢都世界梅罗夫。该军团由冷酷无情的罪犯组成，他们被强行征入帝皇军中服役，以赎其罪。
languages.original_text: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

traits.locale_text: 星界军的一支部队，作为判罪军团，招募自巢都世界梅罗夫。该军团由冷酷无情的罪犯组成，他们被强行征入帝皇军中服役，以赎其罪。

languages.text: Une unité de l'Astra Militarum dont les recrues proviennent du monde ruche de Merov afin de constituer une force pénale. Conscrits au service de l'Empereur, ces criminels endurcis rejoignent les rangs de la légion en espérant ainsi expier leurs offenses.
languages.original_text: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

traits.locale_text: Une unité de l'Astra Militarum dont les recrues proviennent du monde ruche de Merov afin de constituer une force pénale. Conscrits au service de l'Empereur, ces criminels endurcis rejoignent les rangs de la légion en espérant ainsi expier leurs offenses.

languages.text: Merov kovan dünyasında ceza infaz birimi olarak kurulan bir Astra Militarum birliği. Lejyon, saflarını işledikleri suçların kefaretini ödemek üzere İmparator'un hizmetine alınan azılı suçlularla doldurur.
languages.original_text: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

traits.locale_text: Merov kovan dünyasında ceza infaz birimi olarak kurulan bir Astra Militarum birliği. Lejyon, saflarını işledikleri suçların kefaretini ödemek üzere İmparator'un hizmetine alınan azılı suçlularla doldurur.

languages.text: アストラ・ミリタラムの部隊で、メローヴというハヴ・ワールドで刑務官として募集された。このレギオンは、皇帝の奉仕に徴集された経験豊富な犯罪者で構成され、彼らの罪を償う。
languages.original_text: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

traits.locale_text: アストラ・ミリタラムの部隊で、メローヴというハヴ・ワールドで刑務官として募集された。このレギオンは、皇帝の奉仕に徴集された経験豊富な犯罪者で構成され、彼らの罪を償う。

languages.text: Eine auf der Makropolwelt Merov als Strafregiment rekrutierte Einheit des Astra Militarum. Die Legion besteht aus kampferprobten Kriminellen, die in den Dienst des Imperators berufen werden, um für ihre Verbrechen zu büßen.
languages.original_text: A unit of the Astra Militarum, recruited on the hive world of Merov as a penal force. The legion fills its ranks with hardened criminals conscripted into the Emperor's service to atone for their transgressions.

traits.locale_text: Eine auf der Makropolwelt Merov als Strafregiment rekrutierte Einheit des Astra Militarum. Die Legion besteht aus kampferprobten Kriminellen, die in den Dienst des Imperators berufen werden, um für ihre Verbrechen zu büßen.
